## Summary

Describe the change and why it is required.

## Validation

- [ ] PowerShell parser check passed
- [ ] PSScriptAnalyzer reviewed
- [ ] Pester tests passed
- [ ] Dry-run reviewed when sync behavior changed
- [ ] README/runbook/config examples updated where relevant

## Security checklist

- [ ] No secrets or tokens committed
- [ ] No broad Graph permissions added without justification
- [ ] Destructive sync behavior remains guarded
- [ ] Logs do not expose sensitive values
- [ ] Least-privilege operation considered

## Operational impact

Describe scheduling, rollback, monitoring, or migration impact.
